title: hieracium murorum subsp. sparsidentiforme
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. sparsidentiforme, commonly known as a plant in the dandelion-like genus Hieracium, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. sparsidentiforme include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and support kidney function. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
